title: MED28 - Internal Transfers
subject: ELIGIBILITY
body: • Any household in good standing. • Lived in a unit for at least three years. • Internal application form completed. INTERNAL TRANSFERS No eviction notice. No outstanding arrears. Rent paid on time for the last twelve months. Meet the mandate and targeting criteria for the unit. No history of damage to the unit, disturbing neighbours. A HOUSEHOLD IS IN GOOD STANDING IF: Exceptions may apply

title: MED35 - Changes to RGI Eligibility
subject: Important Changes to RGI Eligibility Requirements Effective March 1, 2024
body: The Province of Ontario has recently changed the requirements of the Housing Services Act, 2011. As a result, the City of Toronto must implement an asset limit for rent geared-to-income (RGI) assistance eligibility. Effective March 1, 2024, assessment of RGI eligibility will include any assets that your household has. Issued: November, 2023 Scan for more info:

title: MED06 - Rent Payment - Copy
subject: APRIL | 2025
body: 28 FEDERAL ELECTION VOTING POLLS Tenants, Please be advised that on Monday, April 28th 2025 Elections Canada will have a Polling station available for the Federal Election in the LGR Meeting Room. Voting will be available between 9:30 AM – 9:30 PM To register and vote in the federal election, you must: Be a Canadian Citizen Be at least 18 years old on election day Prove your identity and address Bring your voter card, along with accepted ID to make the voting process easier.

title: MR10 -  Happy New year - Copy
subject: CONTACT: housing@woodgreen.org housing@woodgreen.org
body: In honour of the Holiday Season WoodGreen Community Services would like to gift the tenants a $25 grocery card. Pick up your gift card at reception sometime this week between the hours of 9:30 am to 5:00 pm. Also please note that it is 1 gift card per unit and not per tenant. Thank you and Happy Holidays!

title: OP3 - Construction
subject: Dear Tenants, Due to construction delays on the modernization project of the Towers Renewal, recreation programming offe
body: Dear Tenants, Due to construction delays on the modernization project of the Towers Renewal, recreation programming offered in the Vaughan Tower has been delayed until later this year. We anticipate starting recreation programming in December, in both Vaughan and Dufferin Tower.

title: Reception desk
subject: 800 VAUGHAN LOBBY – RECEPTION DESK UPDATES
body: CONTACT: housing@woodgreen.org housing@woodgreen.org
contact: Effective July 14th , 2025 the desk located at the Lobby of 800 Vaughantransitions into a full-service Housing Business Desk open from 10am-5pm Mon-Fri. The desk will be operated by our Housing Coordinator team and in addition to the usual requests, tenants on 800 Vaughan & 2339 Dufferin (Ward Tower) can access the same supports they would from the Business office. To contact the housing reception desk: Call: 416 781 6621 Email: housingreception@woodgreen.org Services from the housing desk: Work order requests (unit repairs or servicing) Replacement Laundry card / Key & Fob / Visitor Parking pass General Inquiries Tenancy Services from the housing desk: General lease requests Rent Review documentation drop off/follow up Complaint submission Rent Arrears information Tenant Notice updates (Tenant Insurance documentation drop off)
